# PHAssetVideoProgressHandler

**Type Alias**

The signature for a block that Photos calls while downloading asset data from iCloud. Used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/progressHandler] property.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias PHAssetVideoProgressHandler = (Double, (any Error)?, UnsafeMutablePointer<ObjCBool>, [AnyHashable : Any]?) -> Void
```

## Discussion

If you request a video asset whose data is not on the local device, and you have enabled downloading with the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/isNetworkAccessAllowed] property, Photos calls your block periodically to report progress and allow canceling the download.



The block takes the following parameters:



## Fetching Video Data from iCloud

- **isNetworkAccessAllowed**: A Boolean value that specifies whether Photos can download the requested video from iCloud.
- **progressHandler**: A block Photos calls periodically while downloading the video.
